"'''Poison Moon'''" was a short four-part comic shown in a ''[[Dark Horse Extra]]'' issues 44–47. It was written by [[Michael Carriglitto]], illustrated by [[Adrian Sibar]], and colored by [[Dan Jackson]].

==Plot summary==
[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] were investigating a distress signal emanating from a crashed [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class space cruiser]] and found the crew dead. They investigate the ship before finding a woman, [[Alysun Celz]] hiding. She tries to shoot them but is disarmed. She tells them she is the pilot and they were transporting a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]], [[Et Rex]]. Obi-Wan investigates and finds Et Rex, who threatens Kenobi with [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]], not knowing he is a Jedi. Et Rex then tells him the Dark Jedi is actually Celz. Meanwhile, she knocks out Skywalker with [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]]. Rex and Kenobi return in time and use mynocks to subdue her.
